summary: DeepSeek confirmed the primary frontend-acceptance script, closeout, and self-governance scan were moved to the mounted Next.js App Router gate; the Next gate reuses buildArtifact and validateFrontendAcceptanceRunArtifact with requireDurableReleaseEvidence:true; inventory and plan keep legacy deletion blocked by browser-events, scheduler writeback, and shell-test dependencies. Delta reviews identified missing direct browser-error false-pass validator coverage, missing explicit Next legacy-shell fail-closed validation, missing large-file governance in closeout, ambiguous P6.2 deletion-blocker wording, and a governance audit compact-output estimated_cost alias false-red. The validator, tests, closeout gate, P6 plan/inventory, and audit runner normalization were strengthened; final DeepSeek sharded delta synthesis returned PASS.

delta_closure.initial_gap: browser-error false-pass lacked a direct validator test; later delta review also flagged Next legacy-shell false-pass risk, missing large-file gate inside closeout, P6.2 deletion-blocker ambiguity, and governance audit estimated_cost_or_effort alias false-red
fix: src/workflow/frontend-acceptance.js now requires browser_error_results and fails pass artifacts with blocked browser errors or missing frontend_browser_console_error finding
src/workflow/frontend-acceptance.js now rejects nextjs_app_router artifacts unless legacy_static_shell_used is explicitly false
test/frontend-acceptance.test.js now directly rejects browser-error false-pass artifacts and Next artifacts that used the legacy static shell
tools/check-closeout.mjs now runs tools/report-large-files.mjs --fail-on-issues as a closeout gate
docs/governance/LARGE_FILE_GOVERNANCE_PLAN.md and docs/governance/legacy-static-workbench-inventory.json now mark P6.2 replacement gates as pass while keeping deletion blockers in P6.3/P6.4
tools/run-governance-audit-skill-trial.mjs now normalizes estimated_cost_or_effort, estimated_effort, and cost_or_effort to estimated_cost, with test coverage
